original_frontmatter_snapshot.name: frontend-design
original_frontmatter_snapshot.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics. Do NOT use for design review or audit (use web-design-guidelines or web-quality-audit).
original_frontmatter_snapshot.author: Impeccable (Paul Bakaus), based on Anthropic frontend-design
